critic.verdict: An exceptionally polished, highly musical chart that captures the synthwave groove perfectly with outstanding syncopation.

issues.problem: Sudden 16th-note three-lane roll (GAP -> BAR -> NOTE) is a brief spike in density, though highly appropriate and satisfying for the musical climax.

design_notes: This chart's density profile is crafted to mirror the track's highly dynamic zigzag energy curve. Every odd bar features high energy (ranging from 0.89 to 1.00) and is mapped with high-density syncopated patterns (7 to 8 notes per bar). Conversely, every even bar drops into low energy (around 0.60 to 0.66) and is mapped with light breathing room (2 to 3 notes per bar). This direct density-to-energy synchronization ensures a high correlation. Lane placement is strictly dictated by audio band characteristics: center BAR for low-band kick anchors, alternating outer lanes (GAP/NOTE) for mid-band claps, and contoured sweeps matching the lead melodies. Exactly five 1-beat holds are placed on valid sustain candidates to satisfy the difficulty constraint, with all other candidates mapped as normal taps.

design_sections.name: S0
design_sections.intent: Follow the alternating high and low energy bars with corresponding dense sweeps and calm breathers.
